evidence_summary: Establish the transition from a successful covert movement to the sudden realization of a failed rendezvous. The sequence must emphasize the isolation of the character through scale and shadow, moving from kinetic stealth to static panic.
Carter sneaks out of the city with his thoats to reach the rendezvous point. Upon arrival, he realizes the women are not there and that the plan has been compromised.
Carter moving through shadows with thoats in tow.
Carter standing alone, scanning an empty landscape in alarm.
Sneaking from the city perimeter to the rendezvous point and discovering the absence of the women.
